calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Dec-27-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Vantree, CSR: L. Gillian #12355.

Petitioner HE SOOK HYUN was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Publication is in the file.

Proof of Publication that was filed with the court on November 28,2011 shows that the petitioner's name as HG SOOK HYUN changing her name to HELEN HG SOOK KIM, which is differernt from the name on the petition. After reviewing this, the Court does not require the petitioner to republish and GRANTS petitioner's request for a name change.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to HELEN HESOOK KIM.
Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.
